name: Sahbek Rajel (Tv-show)
overview: It follows the story of Azouz and Mahdi, two policemen who are completely different in personality and character. One is reckless and the other is honest and loyal to his family. Their partnership in work leads them to a series of events full of action and comedy.

trailers.title: Balti - Sahbek Rajel (Official Music Video) | "تتر مسلسل "صاحبك راجل
